projectslist.title: Act One
projectslist.description: A social network designed to share stories and gossip, where users can share their anecdotes in a format divided into acts. The platform also includes a focus mode for content creators, allowing stories to be read paragraph by paragraph, removing distractions and providing a more immersive experience.

projectslist.title: Gestión de Pruebas
projectslist.description: This project is currently classified, but it was requested by the UABC Software Development Department. I was responsible for the database design, code development, and the initial system designs. If you need more information about this project, send me an email and we can talk.

projectslist.title: Wolf Forest
projectslist.description: It is a website where you can improve your fictional characters to face them in a battle royale. As you keep playing, special events occur such as deaths, murders, temporary alliances, and item collection, creating a dynamic and random narrative.

achivementsList.title: TalentLand
achivementsList.description: In 2025 I participated with friends from university in the TalentLand hackathon at Expo Guadalajara, within the McDonald's track. We proposed an accessibility-focused application that would help users navigate the app through a bot and options adapted to different disabilities. Although we did not reach the finals, we were part of the 500 participants selected from 1500 applicants.

achivementsList.title: Nasa Space APP Challenge
achivementsList.description: On October 4 and 5, 2025, I participated in the NASA Space Apps Challenge with my team. We developed a weather application idea that provides recommendations based on the user's plans and weather conditions. Although we did not obtain a winning place, the experience was very enriching.

achivementsList.title: Becario
achivementsList.description: I developed a test management system for project tracking. I participated in the database design, user interface design, and both frontend and backend development. The project was developed using React + Vite, NestJS, Prisma, Figma, Lucidchart, and Keycloak. If you need more details about this project, you can send me a message and we can talk

aboutMe.title: About Me
aboutMe.description:
I studied Software Engineering in Emerging Technologies. My professional focus is oriented toward frontend and backend web development, using modern tools and technologies such as React, Vue, NestJS, JavaScript, and TypeScript.

I consider myself a calm, responsible person with a strong willingness to learn new technologies. I am open to exploring job opportunities related to programming and working in a team.

footer.madeWith: Made with React + Vite, TailwindCSS, Framer Motion, and TypeScript
